title: An Act authorizing the town of Manchester-by-the-Sea to adopt a bylaw restricting the use of Second Generation Anticoagulant Rodenticides (SGARs)

abstracts.abstract: By Mr. Tarr, a petition (accompanied by bill, Senate, No. 2896) of Bruce E. Tarr (by vote of the town) for legislation to authorize the town of Manchester-by-the-Sea to adopt a bylaw restricting the use of Second Generation Anticoagulant Rodenticides (SGARs).  Environment and Natural Resources.  [Local approval received]

actions.description: Referred to the committee on Environment and Natural Resources

related_entities.name: committee on Environment and Natural Resources

actions.description: Hearing scheduled for 03/04/2026 from 10:00 AM-12:00 PM in 222
Hearing scheduled for 03/04/2026 from 10:00 AM-12:00 PM in 222
Reporting date extended to Tuesday March 31, 2026
Hearing rescheduled to 03/04/2026 from 10:00 AM-11:15 AM in 222            and Virtual Hearing updated to New End Time
Bill reported favorably by committee and placed in the Orders of the Day for the next session
Read second and ordered to a third reading
